violations.detail: Installing libjemalloc only adds the package to the image; it is not loaded by Ruby unless LD_PRELOAD points at libjemalloc.so or MALLOC_CONF carries jemalloc-specific knobs. Add `ln -s /usr/lib/$(uname -m)-linux-gnu/libjemalloc.so.2 /usr/local/lib/libjemalloc.so` to the install RUN, then set `ENV LD_PRELOAD="/usr/local/lib/libjemalloc.so"` so long-lived Rails workers actually use jemalloc.
violations.message: Final image installs jemalloc but does not preload it via LD_PRELOAD or MALLOC_CONF
violations.sourceCode: RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends libjemalloc2 \

suggestedFix.description: Symlink libjemalloc.so and set LD_PRELOAD so jemalloc is actually loaded
